3285320.name: Clear Drops
3285320.description:
INTRODUCTION

This work is a Adventure told from a first-person perspective.

The theme of this title is "lie and unnecessary."

　STORY

The main character is a boy who overslept while riding the water monorail.

He is woken up in an unknown location by an announcement.

When he heads to the entrance, there's only one humanoid conductor there.

According to her, this is an unmanned observation deck on the water, and it is impossible to go out.

She also informs him that the next monorail train is 45 hours away, leaving him at a loss as to what to do...

　POINT

This work is divided into two parts.

In the story part, the scenario progresses through conversations with characters.

In the commentary part, you can read about the history surrounding the art.


*Please read the guidelines on the official website regarding streaming the play video of this work.
